name: Microchip Technology
analysis: MCHP has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price has pulled back and is testing the 34 EMA at $92.9690. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry $92.9690, stop $84.4272, target $99.6000. Risk/reward is 0.78:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
